key_terms: Gross Receipts (all sales excl. taxes, refunds, employee meals)

clauses.obligation: Non-transferable, non-exclusive license to operate Units at approved Sites, sell Authorized Products, use Proprietary Marks and CFA System
Core menu on Addendum B; may be modified by mutual agreement
License is NOT exclusive. CFA reserves right to operate or license others at any location. Only protection: CFA won't operate at exact same Site during term.

clauses.restriction: License for sole benefit of Licensee; cannot sublicense to third parties

clauses.obligation: Term is __ years from Effective Date (blank to be filled in). NO RIGHT TO EXTEND OR RENEW. CFA may offer new agreement in sole discretion.
Licensee selects Additional Sites subject to CFA approval. CFA has 10 business days to approve/reject. CFA under no obligation to approve.
10% of Gross Receipts monthly by 25th. 7% for transportation venues. Late payment: 12% p.a. interest on amounts 30+ days overdue.
Must train minimum required management employees. First 2 free; additional $250-$400. Licensee pays travel/lodging/wages. Certification valid 5 years, recertification required.

obligations: Operate in full compliance with CFA standards
Use diligent efforts to advance CFA reputation
Cannot use premises for non-CFA purposes
Cannot operate on Sundays or Christmas Day

clauses.obligation: Manual is confidential. $500 replacement fee for lost/destroyed manuals. CFA can modify manual unilaterally.

clauses.during_term: Cannot sell nationally/regionally branded chicken products or substantially similar products at Licensed Site. Cannot disclose Trade Secrets.
clauses.post_term: 12 months at former Licensed Site. Trade secret protection permanent. Confidential info: 2 years post-termination (3 years for managers).

obligations: Use Proprietary Marks only as authorized
No website/internet presence without CFA approval
No use of CHICK-FIL-A in corporate name

triggers: CFA material breach (30 days cure, extendable)

curable_triggers: Failure to open during specified hours
OPENING ON SUNDAY OR CHRISTMAS DAY

obligations: Immediately cease CFA operations at Sites
Pay all sums due within 30 days
Return all manuals and confidential materials
Remove all CFA signage and branding

clauses.restriction: No assignment or transfer without CFA prior written approval. CFA has right but not obligation to approve. CFA may assign freely.

clauses.indemnification: Licensee must indemnify CFA for claims arising from Unit operations

key_provisions: Modification requires writing signed by both parties
US Executive Order representation (not a suspected terrorist)

clauses.obligation: Units may NOT open on Sundays or Christmas Day. Opening on Sunday or Christmas Day is a CFA Termination Event.

distinctive_clauses: Sunday/Christmas Day closure requirement — opening on these days is a termination event
Chick-fil-A Culture compliance — actions inconsistent with CFA Culture are termination events
Pandemic/epidemic clause — CFA can terminate if operations are frustrated by a pandemic
Term blank — no standard term; filled in on a case-by-case basis
No renewal right — explicit acknowledgment that Licensee has NO right to renew
